tests.test_name: All add-ons - sections present in JSON output for QA Manager
tests.description: Verifies that when a QA Manager analyzes a BDD test file with all add-ons enabled, the downloaded JSON output contains fully populated sections for technical review, gap analysis, annotation summary, risk assessment, and recommendations.

test_coverage.verification_step: Documentation and analysis appears in output panel
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis runs successfully and results are visible to the user

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON output has no unresolved values
test_coverage.what_it_checks: All fields in the output are populated — no placeholders or missing data remain

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key 'technical_review' with non-empty 'test_quality'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The technical review add-on produces quality assessments for the uploaded tests

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key 'gap_analysis' with non-empty 'coverage_gaps'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The gap analysis add-on identifies areas of missing test coverage

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key 'annotation_summary' with non-empty 'annotation_health'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The annotation summary add-on evaluates the health and completeness of test annotations

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key 'risk_assessment' with non-empty 'scenario_risk_ratings'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The risk assessment add-on assigns risk ratings to individual test scenarios

test_coverage.verification_step: JSON has top-level key 'recommendations' with non-empty 'actions'
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The recommendations add-on produces actionable next steps based on the analysis
